response.justification: Candidate has 15+ years of solid software engineering experience with strong full-stack credentials (TypeScript, Node.js, AWS) and recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq. However, dedicated GenAI/LLM production experience appears limited to roughly one year, falling short of the 8+ years building production AI solutions required. No explicit evidence of RAG architectures, vector databases, multi-agent frameworks (LangGraph/CrewAI), or LLM evaluation pipelines. Strong craftsmanship, mentoring, and customer-facing workshop experience partially offset the AI-depth gap, making this a borderline maybe rather than a clear yes.
strengths: 15+ years shipping production software across cloud, web, and embedded
Recent MCP and agentic-workflow tooling work at re:cinq
Strong mentoring/teaching track record (workshops, dojos, courses)
concerns: Production GenAI experience appears <2 years vs. 8+ required
No demonstrated RAG, vector DB, or multi-agent framework experience
Limited evidence of enterprise customer-facing technical discovery leadership
